scripts.build: echo 'Please choose a target: build:firefox or build:chrome, or build:production:firefox or build:production:chrome'
scripts.build:production: echo 'Please choose a target: build:production:firefox or build:production:chrome'
scripts.preview:production: echo 'Please choose a target: preview:production:firefox or preview:production:chrome'
scripts.preview:production:firefox: npm run build:production:firefox && web-ext -s build/production/firefox run --target firefox-desktop
scripts.preview:production:chrome: npm run build:production:chrome && web-ext -s build/production/chrome run --target chromium --arg='--disable-search-engine-choice-screen'
scripts.watch: echo 'Please choose a target: watch:firefox or watch:chrome'
scripts.start: echo 'Please choose a target: start:firefox or start:chrome'
scripts.web-ext:run: echo 'Please choose a target: web-ext:run:firefox or web-ext:run:chrome'
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:style
